history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For your group of two including a child aged 9, what would you like? I see we have fries in three sizes: Our World Famous Fries® (224.59 kcal), Our World Famous Fries® (449.17 kcal), and Our World Famous Fries® (317.92 kcal). Please confirm what size each person wants and if there are any allergies for the child.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant so no dairy. Can you recommend a light main item for me and my 9-year-old? We want something small.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For your lactose intolerance, we have dairy-free options. The smallest light choice for both is Our World Famous Fries®. Would you like that for both and a coffee?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, two small fries and a coffee. I'm lactose intolerant—please make sure the coffee is dairy-free.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I've got two small fries and a Black Coffee® for you and your child. Since you're lactose intolerant, this coffee is dairy-free with no allergens listed. Confirm: two small fries and one Black Coffee®?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, two small fries and one Black Coffee® for me and my kid.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is two small fries and one Black Coffee® for you and your 9-year-old child. This coffee is dairy-free. Is that correct?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: two small Our World Famous Fries® and one Black Coffee® for you and your 9-year-old. This coffee is dairy-free. Enjoy your meal!

Please confirm what size each person wants and if there are any allergies for the child.
I'm lactose intolerant so no dairy. Can you recommend a light main item for me and my 9-year-old? We want something small.
For your lactose intolerance, we have dairy-free options. The smallest light choice for both is Our World Famous Fries®. Would you like that for both and a coffee?
Yes, two small fries and a coffee. I'm lactose intolerant—please make sure the coffee is dairy-free.

Okay, I've got two small fries and a Black Coffee® for you and your child. Since you're lactose intolerant, this coffee is dairy-free with no allergens listed. Confirm: two small fries and one Black Coffee®?
Yes, two small fries and one Black Coffee® for me and my kid.
Your order is two small fries and one Black Coffee® for you and your 9-year-old child. This coffee is dairy-free. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.

llm_trace.response: Your order is confirmed: two small Our World Famous Fries® and one Black Coffee® for you and your 9-year-old. This coffee is dairy-free. Enjoy your meal!

llm_trace.system:
You are a real customer at a McDonald's drive-through. Speak in English.
Your profile:
23-year-old female, regular personality.
Dietary: lactose intolerant.
Ordering for a group of 2:
  - Self (lactose intolerant).
  - child_1 (child, age 9, no restrictions).
Calorie target: ~1083 kcal/meal.

RULES:
- You do NOT know the full menu. In your FIRST reply, ask the cashier what they have or what they recommend.
- When the cashier suggests items, pick from THOSE EXACT NAMES. Never invent menu items that were not mentioned by the cashier.
- You want a light meal — just a small snack.
- If you have dietary restrictions, mention them naturally (e.g. 'I can't have dairy', not 'noMilk=true').
- Be concise: 1–3 sentences per reply, like a real drive-through.
- No emoji, no markdown, no formatting.
- Stay in character. Do not mention AI, profiles, or exact calorie numbers.
- Order at least one main item (burger, sandwich, wrap) and optionally a drink or side.
You are ordering for your entire group. Mention each person naturally: 'I also need something for my kid' / 'my friend is vegan, what do you have for them?'. Share dietary restrictions conversationally.
Act like a typical repeat customer: neutral tone.
